title: The Silent Avenger
writer: Frank Foster Davis, George Green, Doris Schroeder
actors: Charles Delaney, Ranger the Dog, Duane Thompson
plot: Stanley Gilmore, the son of a railroad president, atones for a series of wild escapades by traveling to Tennessee to secure a right-of-way through the property of farmer Dave Wade. Accompanied by his dog, Thunder, Stanley meets wi...
